purpose: Define a reusable, placeholder-safe contract for future business registration, admin filing, policy, and HWPX document packets before a target official form or Owner private data is supplied.

source_basis.note: Business registration timing, per-place registration, signature, and Hometax online submission possibility are official-source inputs for packet owner-only boundaries.
Submission documents vary by individual/corporation, lease, permit, partnership, and other facts; packet schema must separate fact-specific attachments from generic drafts.
Hancom publishes HWP and OWPML format material; future HWPX generation should use documented/open structures and fixtures.
HWPX is an XML package based on OWPML, so generated packets should be structured, diffable, and reviewable before Owner submission.

source_basis.authority: Financial Services Commission / Financial Supervisory Service
source_basis.note: A specific no-separate-fee ancillary context is not blanket clearance for Autofolio commercial recommendation claims.

source_basis.authority: Financial Services Commission / Financial Supervisory Service
source_basis.note: Individualized advice and automatic execution for users are regulated watch items; admin packets must keep these as review gates.
Use law.go.kr as the canonical statute lookup for later professional/regulator review packets.

packet_field_groups.description: Business facts that can be tracked without private identity material, such as product form, customer segment, pricing posture, support/refund draft status, and selected procedure.
Placeholder labels for facts the Owner supplies outside the repo, such as identity, exact legal name, business address, certificate/authentication, and payment account details.
Draft descriptions, business purpose text, policy clauses, checklists, and attachment descriptions derived from approved business-plan sections.
Fact-specific attachment checklist, not the attachments themselves unless they are public templates with no Owner private data.
Reviewable Markdown first, optional DOCX/PDF/HWPX only from template fixtures and structured data.
Login, authentication, signature, payment, upload, final review, and official submission stay Owner-only.
Tax accountant, attorney, FSC/FSS, KIS, privacy, refund, and terms review gates where applicable.

prototype_packet_candidates.output: field map and Markdown review draft first; HWPX only after target form fixture is selected
policy source packet for professional review, not public terms
transform from BUSINESS-PLAN.md into selected program form only

forbidden_repo_data: OAuth client secret or API secret
signed official filing copy with private data
forbidden_actions: Do not log in to Hometax, Government24, Hancom account, KIS, bank, payment provider, or any official service.
Do not authenticate, sign, pay, upload, submit, withdraw, correct, or contact authorities on behalf of the Owner.
Do not store private identity numbers, certificates, credentials, bank account numbers, customer data, broker keys, or production secrets in the repo.
Do not state legal, tax, accounting, securities, KIS, or regulatory clearance as final advice.
Do not generate final HWPX or PDF files from a target official form until the form and private-data handling path are selected.

verification.notes: Gate validates local schema/contract only. It does not validate a specific official form and does not generate, submit, or sign documents.
